nodes.name: 皮乌拉大区
nodes.summary: 皮乌拉大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、Ecuadorian piculet、Red-faced parrot等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Slaty becard
nodes.summary: Slaty becard（Slaty becard，学名 Pachyramphus spodiurus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 通贝斯大区
nodes.summary: 通贝斯大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、Peruvian plantcutter、Northern schiffornis等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 埃斯梅拉达斯省
nodes.summary: 埃斯梅拉达斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括洪氏红嘴蜂鸟、大绿金刚鹦鹉、Rufous piha等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The slaty becard is found in western Ecuador from western Esmeraldas Province south and slightly into northern Peru's Tumbes and Piura departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The slaty becard is found in western Ecuador from western Esmeraldas Province south and slightly into northern Peru's Tumbes and Piura departments

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The main threats to the species are habitat loss due to agricultural expansion and subsequent herbicide use, selective felling of valuable trees and persistent grazing by goats and cattle inside and outside of protected areas...Significant habitat loss continues in both Ecuador and Peru, at least in unprotected areas, and soon all lowland forest will have been removed unless effective action is taken urgently...However, the species has been reported to persist in some areas that have been subject to a substantial degree of habitat degradation." It is considered "scarce and local" in Ecuador and "uncommon" in Peru. It is found in several nominally protected areas but some of them are subject to illegal clearing and grazing
